items.title: Tapo
items.description: Tapo is a comprehensive laptop e-commerce platform that offers a range of features including authentication, product management, order processing, real-time chat, payment integration, and admin tooling.
items.overview: I developed Tapo as a full-stack learning project to apply my knowledge of Java, React, and modern web technologies. The platform provides a seamless user experience for laptop retail, with a focus on production-ready patterns and scalability.
features: 🔐 Authentication: JWT + Refresh Token (Redis), Google OAuth2, email verification, RBAC (4 roles)
🛍️ Shopping: Product catalog, cart, order lifecycle, PayOS payment
⭐ Reviews: 1–5 star ratings, text reviews, admin approve/reject workflow
💬 Real-time Chat: WebSocket (STOMP) between customers and staff
🏔️ Vouchers: Fixed / percentage discount, usage limits, date range
⚡️ Flash Sale: Countdown timer, stock-limited campaigns
📦 Inventory: Stock management, auto-export on delivery, low-stock alerts
📝 Blog: News & reviews, SEO sitemap (/sitemap.xml)
📊 Admin Dashboard: Revenue charts, order stats, user management
💳 Instalment Calculator: 6 / 12 / 18 / 24-month payment plans
🔄 Return Requests: Customer return flow with admin processing
🌐 i18n: Vietnamese / English UI (react-i18next)

backend: Built a RESTful API backend using Java Spring Boot 4.0.3, providing authentication, product management, order processing, and real-time chat functionality.
Implemented JWT authentication with refresh tokens stored in Redis for secure and efficient authentication.
Integrated PayOS payment gateway for secure and reliable payment processing.
Utilized Spring WebSocket (STOMP) for real-time chat functionality between customers and staff.
frontend: Developed a responsive Single Page Application (SPA) using React 19 and TypeScript 5.9, leveraging Vite for efficient builds and deployments.
Styled the application using Tailwind CSS v4, ensuring a consistent and visually appealing design throughout.
Managed complex state synchronization and API requests using React Query and Axios.
Implemented internationalization (i18n) using react-i18next for Vietnamese and English UI support.
React 19
TypeScript 5.9
Tailwind CSS v4
Vite
React Query
Axios

items.title: Deca Project
items.description: Deca is an intelligent English learning platform that combines spaced repetition, AI-powered feedback, and interactive listening practice to accelerate vocabulary and phrase acquisition.
items.overview: Deca is a personal English learning tool I built to explore AI integration in education. The app focuses on practical phrase learning through structured topic management, listening comprehension exercises, and real-time pronunciation feedback — inspired by how native speakers actually learn through context and repetition.
features: 📚 Topic & Phrase Management: Organize vocabulary into topics with full CRUD support, bulk import, and filtering.
🎧 Listening Practice Mode: Audio playback with progress tracking; users transcribe what they hear, with intelligent answer normalization (e.g., contractions like 'I'm' == 'I am').
💡 Smart Hint System: Progressive word-by-word hints, color-coded diff visualization (correct/hinted/hidden), and optional full-answer reveal.
🔤 Pronunciation Cards: Click any word to view IPA (UK/US), listen to accent-specific pronunciation, and get a Vietnamese translation via dictionary API.
🤖 AI Integration: AI-assisted phrase suggestions and learning feedback powered by integrated language model APIs.
⌨️ Keyboard Shortcut Support: Hotkey bindings for audio playback and navigation to enable a hands-free study flow.

backend: Built a Next.js API layer with file-based routing to serve topics, phrases, and AI completions.
Integrated external dictionary API (dictionaryapi.dev) and translation API (MyMemory) for real-time IPA and meaning lookup.
Implemented server-side AI proxy to securely forward requests to language model APIs without exposing keys on the client.
frontend: Developed a responsive SPA with Next.js 15 (App Router) and TypeScript, leveraging React Server Components where appropriate.
Styled with TailwindCSS using a consistent design token system; implemented a two-column layout with state-driven progressive disclosure to prevent layout shifts.
Managed complex UI state (idle/wrong/correct) for listening practice with answer normalization, diff rendering, and fixed-position IPA tooltip using getBoundingClientRect.
Used TanStack Query for server-state management, caching topic/phrase data and handling background refetching.
Integrated Web Speech API (SpeechSynthesis) with custom progress tracking for audio playback simulation.
Next.js 15
TypeScript
TailwindCSS
TanStack Query
Web Speech API

items.title: Trava Project
items.description: Trava is a comprehensive Task Management and Team Collaboration System designed to streamline project workflows.
items.overview: Trava is a multi-workspace task management system. I developed this project to explore Clean Architecture and modern web technologies, focusing on high scalability and a smooth user experience for team collaboration.
features: 🔐 Member Management: Secure registration, login, personal profile management, and security updates.
🏢 Workspace Management (Spaces): Supports Private and Team space models with clear role-based access control.
📩 Invitation System: Mechanism to send/receive Workspace invitations and manage invitation statuses in real-time.

✅ Task Management:
- Supports complex Task structures (Parent/Sub-tasks).
- Manages priority levels (Low to Urgent) and workloads (Points).
- Direct interaction via a built-in commenting system.
🔔 Notification System: Provides real-time updates on Space changes, Task assignments, and deadline reminders.

backend: Engineered a scalable RESTful API with .NET 8, implementing Clean Architecture to decouple the domain core from infrastructure.
Utilized CQRS pattern with MediatR to separate read/write models, drastically optimizing complex database queries.
Designed a robust data access layer using Entity Framework Core and PostgreSQL with Repository and Unit of Work patterns.
Integrated Redis for high-speed distributed caching of frequently accessed workspace configurations.
Secured endpoints using JWT authentication, implementing granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to govern Spaces and Tasks.
frontend: Developed a highly responsive Single Page Application (SPA) leveraging Angular and TailwindCSS.
Managed complex cross-component state synchronization for real-time Kanban board updates and comment threads.
Built reusable and accessible UI components extensively utilizing the PrimeNG component library.
Ensured client-side security with strict generic Authentication Route Guards and centralized HTTP Interceptors.
Angular
TailwindCSS
PrimeNG

items.title: PhyGen Project
items.description: Phygen is an AI-Powered Physics Exam Generator System that helps teachers create exams automatically.
items.overview: Phygen leverages AI to automate the creation of physics exams for high school students. It supports custom difficulty levels and topic selection, generating high-quality questions and detailed explanations instantly.
features: 🏫 Curriculum Management: Flexible organization by Curriculum -> Subject -> Chapter -> Topic -> Section.
📝 Question Bank: Supports various question types, media attachments via Cloudinary, and categorization by difficulty and educational goals.
⚙️ Automated Exam Generation (Matrixized Exam): Builds detailed exam matrices and automatically synthesizes exams meeting precise knowledge and difficulty requirements.
💳 Payment Integration: Supports secure transactions via the PayOS gateway.

🔐 Security & Authentication:
- Login/Registration with Email OTP.
- Detailed Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).
- Utilizes JWT Bearer tokens for API security.
📧 Notifications: Real-time notification system for course statuses, exams, and transactions.
💬 Online Support: Integrated Chatbox module to assist users and answer inquiries.
📄 Document Publishing: Supports exporting exams and documents to professional Word/PDF formats.

backend: Architected a robust document generation backend using .NET 8, adhering strictly to Clean Architecture principles.
Seamlessly integrated advanced LLMs (ChatGPT and Gemini APIs) to procedurally synthesize curriculum-accurate physics exam matrices.
Implemented secure payment processing workflows with external PayOS webhooks, ensuring ACID compliance for financial logs.
Boosted API responsiveness by implementing comprehensive response optimization strategies using Redis.
frontend: Crafted a specialized, interactive React Single Page Application focused on fluid user experiences during complex exam generation.
Implemented real-time streaming and previews of AI-generated text and LaTeX mathematical formulas.
Designed a sleek, intuitive layout using TailwindCSS, optimizing multi-step wizard interfaces for educators.
Engineered complex state management to track curriculum trees, dynamic exam matrices, and ongoing payment transactions.
React
TailwindCSS
Vercel

items.title: TimeSwap Project
items.description: TimeSwap is a Time Exchange and Job Marketplace Platform connecting users for skill sharing and services.
items.overview: TimeSwap creates a marketplace where users can exchange services using a 'time' currency. It includes robust job listing, search, and application systems with an integrated E-Wallet for secure transactions.
features:
👤 User Authentication:
- Login / Register with email.
- Forgot Password and Change Password support.
- Secure Logout from the system.

📋 Job Management:
- Job Listings: View all available jobs with essential details.
- Job Search: Search jobs by name, fee, industry, category, location.
- Post Job: Post a new job.
- Apply for Jobs: Submit applications with user profiles.
- Job Details: View full job descriptions and requirements.
- Job Applicant List: Employers can review applicants and select the most suitable candidate.

🤖 AI Chatbot Integration:
- Integrated ChatGPT API to assist users with job-related inquiries.

💳 Payment Management:
- E-Wallet Integration for seamless transactions.
- Transaction History to keep track of payments.

📄 User Profile Management:
- View & Edit Profile: Update user's profile.
- Account Information: View subscription details and current balance.

backend: Developed a high-performance backend ecosystem using .NET 8 supporting high volumes of transactional 'Time' exchanges.
Engineered a bulletproof E-Wallet ledger system within PostgreSQL, meticulously tracking time-credits using optimistic concurrency.
Interfaced with the ChatGPT API to power an intelligent matching backend that recommends relevant job listings by parsing user skillsets.
Automated CI/CD pipelines for seamless, zero-downtime deployments onto scalable DigitalOcean droplets.
frontend: Built a Progressive Web App (PWA) oriented SPA with Angular 18 focusing on lightning-fast job discovery.
Deeply integrated Google Maps API for geospatial search, enabling users to find local freelance opportunities intuitively.
Designed a polished dashboard layout employing TailwindCSS and PrimeNG for complex data grids and user statistics.
Engineered robust dynamic forms with comprehensive reactive validators for job posting and profile onboarding.
mobile: Developed a native Android application using modern Kotlin standards and the declarative Jetpack Compose UI toolkit.
Architected the mobile client with the MVVM pattern alongside Android Architecture Components for reactive UI state.
Utilized Retrofit and Coroutines/Flow for asynchronous, non-blocking network requests ensuring smooth scrolling in job feeds.
Embedded an AI conversational interface directly on-device and leveraged location services for precise geographic job filtering.

frontend: Angular
TailwindCSS
PrimeNG

items.title: Adobe Migration Project
items.description: A large-scale content migration project for an enterprise client using Adobe Experience Manager (AEM).
items.overview: This project involved migrating and validating thousands of landing pages from legacy CMS platforms to Adobe Experience Manager. I ensured structural integrity and content consistency across global enterprise environments.
features: 📄 Large-Scale Migration: Migrated and validated thousands of landing pages from legacy CMS platforms.
✅ Content Consistency: Ensured structural integrity and content consistency across global enterprise environments.
🔄 Agile Governance: Followed strictly governed Agile workflows for enterprise deployment and collaboration.

backend: Worked extensively with AEM Content Fragments and components.
Validated landing pages for data accuracy and consistency.
Followed strictly governed Agile workflows for enterprise deployment.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in a large-scale project.
